name: CI

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - master
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - master

permissions:
  contents: read

jobs:
  test:
    permissions:
      actions: write  # for styfle/cancel-workflow-action to cancel/stop running workflows
      contents: read  # for actions/checkout to fetch code
    name: "${{ matrix.root-pom }} on JDK ${{ matrix.java }} on ${{ matrix.os }}"
    strategy:
      matrix:
        os: [ ubuntu-latest ]
        java: [ 8, 11, 17, 21 ]
        root-pom: [ 'pom.xml', 'android/pom.xml' ]
        include:
          - os: windows-latest
            java: 21
            root-pom: pom.xml
    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
    env:
      ROOT_POM: ${{ matrix.root-pom }}
    steps:
      # Cancel any previous runs for the same branch that are still running.
      - name: 'Cancel previous runs'
        uses: styfle/cancel-workflow-action@3155a141048f8f89c06b4cdae32e7853e97536bc # 0.13.0
        with:
          access_token: ${{ github.token }}
      - name: 'Check out repository'
        uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
      # When we specify multiple JDKs, the final one becomes the default, which is used to execute Maven itself.
      # Our Maven configuration then specifies different JDKs to use for some of the steps:

        with:

            ${{ matrix.java }}
            25
          distribution: 'temurin'
          cache: 'maven'
      - name: 'Install'
        shell: bash
        run: ./mvnw -B -ntp -Dtoolchain.skip install -U -DskipTests=true -f $ROOT_POM
      - name: 'Test'
        shell: bash
        run: ./mvnw -B -ntp -P!standard-with-extra-repos -Dtoolchain.skip verify -U -Dmaven.javadoc.skip=true -Dsurefire.toolchain.version=${{ matrix.java }} -f $ROOT_POM

            25
          distribution: 'temurin'

      - name: 'Generate latest docs'

FROM ubuntu:22.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    curl \
    git \
    build-essential \
    ca-certificates \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y openjdk-11-jdk && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN curl -fsSL https://github.com/adoptium/temurin-build/releases/download/jdk-25.0.1%2B9/OpenJDK25U-jdk_x64_linux_hotspot_25.0.1_9.tar.gz -o /tmp/java25.tar.gz && \
    tar -xzf /tmp/java25.tar.gz -C /opt && \
    rm /tmp/java25.tar.gz

ENV JAVA_HOME=/usr/lib/jvm/java-11-openjdk-amd64 \
    PATH=/opt/jdk-25.0.1+9/bin:$JAVA_HOME/bin:$PATH

WORKDIR /app

COPY repo/ /app/

COPY run.sh /run.sh

RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]

echo "Test exit code: $TEST_EXIT"

if [ $TEST_EXIT -eq 0 ]; then
  echo "FINAL_STATUS = SUCCESS"
else
  echo "FINAL_STATUS = FAIL"
fi

FROM ubuntu:22.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    curl \
    git \
    build-essential \
    ca-certificates \
    apt-transport-https \
    gnupg \
    lsb-release \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    openjdk-11-jdk \
    openjdk-21-jdk \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN mkdir -p /usr/lib/jvm && \
    cd /tmp && \
    curl -fsSL -o java25.tar.gz https://github.com/adoptium/temurin25-binaries/releases/download/jdk-25.0.0%2B0/OpenJDK25U-jdk_x64_linux_hotspot_25.0.0_0.tar.gz 2>/dev/null || \
    curl -fsSL -o java25.tar.gz https://builds.shipilev.net/jdk25/openjdk-latest-linux-x64.tar.gz 2>/dev/null || \
    echo "Java 25 download failed, will use Java 21 as fallback"

RUN cd /tmp && \
    if [ -f java25.tar.gz ]; then \
      tar -xzf java25.tar.gz -C /usr/lib/jvm/ && \
      rm java25.tar.gz; \
    fi

ENV JAVA_HOME=/usr/lib/jvm/java-11-openjdk-amd64 \
    PATH=$JAVA_HOME/bin:$PATH

RUN mkdir -p /root/.m2

COPY <<EOF /root/.m2/toolchains.xml
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<toolchains>
  <toolchain>
    <type>jdk</type>
    <provides>
      <version>11</version>
    </provides>
    <configuration>
      <jdkHome>/usr/lib/jvm/java-11-openjdk-amd64</jdkHome>
    </configuration>
  </toolchain>
  <toolchain>
    <type>jdk</type>
    <provides>
      <version>25</version>
    </provides>
    <configuration>
      <jdkHome>/usr/lib/jvm/jdk-25.0.0</jdkHome>
    </configuration>
  </toolchain>
  <toolchain>
    <type>jdk</type>
    <provides>
      <version>21</version>
    </provides>
    <configuration>
      <jdkHome>/usr/lib/jvm/java-21-openjdk-amd64</jdkHome>
    </configuration>
  </toolchain>
</toolchains>
EOF

WORKDIR /app

COPY repo/ /app/

COPY run.sh /run.sh

RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]

FROM ubuntu:22.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    curl \
    git \
    build-essential \
    ca-certificates \
    apt-transport-https \
    gnupg \
    lsb-release \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    openjdk-11-jdk \
    openjdk-21-jdk \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN mkdir -p /usr/lib/jvm && \
    cd /tmp && \
    curl -fsSL -o java25.tar.gz "https://api.adoptium.net/v3/binary/latest/25/ga/linux/x64/jdk/hotspot/normal/eclipse?project=jdk" || \
    curl -fsSL -o java25.tar.gz "https://builds.shipilev.net/jdk25u/openjdk-25-latest-linux-x64.tar.gz" || \
    echo "Java 25 download attempt failed, proceeding with Java 21"

RUN cd /tmp && \
    if [ -f java25.tar.gz ] && file java25.tar.gz | grep -q "gzip"; then \
      tar -xzf java25.tar.gz -C /usr/lib/jvm/ 2>/dev/null || true; \
      rm -f java25.tar.gz; \
      ls -la /usr/lib/jvm/ | grep -i jdk; \
    fi

ENV JAVA_HOME=/usr/lib/jvm/java-11-openjdk-amd64 \
    PATH=$JAVA_HOME/bin:$PATH

RUN mkdir -p /root/.m2

COPY toolchains.xml /root/.m2/toolchains.xml

WORKDIR /app

COPY repo/ /app/

COPY run.sh /run.sh

RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]
